docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY SHEILA B. LOCKETT BAIL BONDS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY SHEILA B. LOCKETT BAIL BONDS $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,108.00

MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT SHEILA B. LOCKETT BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR DEC-05-2001 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
OPPOSITION MOTION BY REAL PARTIES TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGT/SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 301, MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE, CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2001, DENIED
ORDER DENYING MTN TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGT & SET ASIDE BAIL FOR
REIMBURSEMENT OF FIRST FILING FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
